name: @dt/database
description: Shared database models, schemas, and migrations for DT Asistan App

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/schema-manifest', { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync('src/schema-manifest').forEach(f => { if (f.endsWith('.yaml')) fs.copyFileSync('src/schema-manifest/' + f, 'dist/schema-manifest/' + f) })"
